risks.title: Moments That Defined 2026 World Cup
risks.description: From Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo to Cape Verde's fairytale run, VAR controversies and unforgettable fan moments, relive the memories that made the 2026 FIFA World Cup the biggest and most dramatic tournament in history.

risks.title: Donald Trump 'wants Gianni Infantino to be next UN secretary general' as controversial World Cup bromance takes astonishing twist
